name: [PD-11] Создать новый сервер с правильными данными (Кейс-3)
fullName: [PD-11] Создать новый сервер с правильными данными (Кейс-3)

steps.name: assert expected **{ Object (success, data, ...) }** to have property **data**
assert expected **{ Object (accessToken, expiresAt) }** to have property **accessToken**
assert expected **<h2.font-sub-heading.mb-0>** to have text **Виртуальные серверы**
assert expected **<h2.font-sub-heading.mb-0>** to have text **Новый сервер**
assert expected **{ Object (error, errMessage, ...) }** to have property **data**

parameters.name: actual
parameters.value:
{
  "error": 0,
  "errMessage": null,
  "data": {
    "id": "FU1766656970",
    "vmName": "TS-With-Custom-OS",
    "status": "STATUS_NEW",
    "cpuCores": 2,
    "ram": 4,
    "localDiskSize": 10,
    "osName": "custom_os",
    "diskType": "SSD",
    "disks": [
      {
        "id": null,
        "name": "scsi0",
        "size": 10,
        "diskType": "SSD",
        "boot": true
      }
    ],
    "nets": [],
    "password": "g8D6HL1*UuvHVb3",
    "hasSSH": false,
    "blocked": true,
    "sshAvail": false,
    "passAvail": false,
    "isQemuAgentActive": false
  }
}
